ticket.subject: Critical: Users table lost 8,900 records following database upgrade at 23:45 UTC
ticket.body: Our production users table experienced significant data loss during last night's upgrade procedure that started at 23:45 UTC. We're now missing 8,900 user records compared to our pre-upgrade backup from 23:15 UTC. This is causing login failures for affected accounts and we need immediate assistance. Can you verify if point-in-time recovery is enabled for our database cluster and if we can restore from the last 6 hours? This is a critical data-loss situation that requires urgent recovery before customer support tickets escalate. Please advise on next steps immediately.
